name: Kobold Shaman
description: A kobold mystic wearing bone fetishes and wielding crude magic. Supports other kobolds with healing and minor hexes.

attacks.name: Bone Staff
attacks.description: A weak strike with a gnarled bone staff

attacks.name: Hex Bolt
attacks.description: A crackling bolt of dark energy

attacks.name: Minor Heal
attacks.description: Restores health to an ally kobold

special_abilities.name: Mystic Shield
special_abilities.description: Can cast a weak shield on allies, granting +1 AC temporarily

special_abilities.name: Tribal Healer
special_abilities.description: Can heal allied kobolds once per combat

behavior.notes: Stays back, heals allies, and casts hexes. Will retreat early if threatened in melee.
